title: Disillusioned Adventurers
overview: Four adventurers meet in a tavern and share tales of woe.

title: The Ultimate Party Is Formed? Survivors!
overview: The party sets out on their very first expedition together.

title: Curran's Secret
overview: Curran thinks back into her past, and what made her the disillusioned woman she is today.

title: The Labyrinth of Bonds
overview: The party goes on an excursion to find a magical sword.

title: A Meeting With the Iron Tigers
overview: Nick meets a figure from his past he never wanted to see again.

title: Mathematics Bare Knuckle
overview: The Survivors challenge the Iron Tigers in a battle of both brains and brawn.

title: Gambling Lesson
overview: After earning a hefty sum of money by arresting the Iron Tigers, Nick and the others spend their days quietly enjoying their hobbies, but only for a short time.

title: The Beautiful Paladin
overview: Nick learns more about his favorite idol, and discovers a surprising connection between them.

title: The Legend of the Labyrinth City - Stepping Man?!
overview: The Survivors head into the worst parts of the city to track down a mysterious kidnapper.

title: Labyrinth Dragnet
overview: The Survivors continue their search for the dreaded Stepping Man.

title: Survivors VS Stepping Man
overview: The Survivors corner Stepping Man and reveal his true identity.

title: Adventurers Can't Save the World Yet
overview: After the bitter ending of the fight against Stepping Man, the Survivors are devastated and unsure of what to do next.
